MINI MINUTES FOR 2-13-08 *****ENTRY/FILING/DOCUMENT REASSIGNED FROM FSD-07-362569 TO FDV-08-805922 PER COURT ORDER 4-7-08***** ***D404-M SLABACH, CLERK: P HUEI REPORTER: MARIA VISCIO, CSR #12353, BAILIFF: C. GARCIA. DOMESTIC VIOLENCE B. MOVING PARTY: PERSON TO BE PROTECTED-SAMARAH EDDS. PETITIONER AND RESPONDENT PRESENT IN PRO PER. STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM SIGNED. BOTH PARTIES SWORN AND EXAMINED. AFTER ARGUMENT AND SUBMISSION, GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, COURT GRANTS 3YR STANDARD PERSONAL CONDUCT AND 100YD RESTRAINING ORDER AGAINST RESP FOR PETNR, PETNR'S RESIDENCE, AND PLACE OF EMPLOYMENT. FIREARM RELINQUISHMENT APPLIES. RELINQUISHMENT PROVISION REAGARDING FIREARM IS SATISFIED BY RESP'S SWORN TESTIMONY. RECORDING OF PROHIBITED COMMUNICATION ALLOWED. RESP SHALL NOT MAKE ANY EFFORTS TO OBTAIN CONTACT INFORMATION FOR PETNR, PETNR'S FAMILY, AND FAMILY'S CARETAKERS. PARTIES RECEIVED COURT-PREPARED ORDER.
